meta.title: Maria Sverdlik — Art Teacher
meta.description: Portfolio of an art teacher: teaching philosophy, CV, personal works, student works and contacts.

about.heading: A quiet studio where technique serves freedom.
about.text: I teach drawing, painting and composition to children, teenagers and adults. In class we connect observation, craft and the student's personal interests — so the result is not a lucky pretty picture, but a clear step forward.
about.portraitCaption: Replace the photo in the images/site folder.

principles.title: See the form
principles.text: We learn to break objects down into volume, light, silhouette and rhythm — not to copy the surface.

principles.title: Embrace the attempt
principles.text: Drafts, quick sketches and mistakes become part of the living process of learning.

principles.title: Build the craft
principles.text: Materials, composition, tone, colour and line gradually become a reliable set of tools.

principles.title: Keep the voice
principles.text: The teacher's job is to help the student become more precise — without making their work look the same.

cv.heading: Experience at a glance.
cv.intro: This section is built as an editable timeline. Real dates, exhibitions, education and projects can be added later.

timeline.title: Art Education
timeline.text: Academic drawing, painting, composition, art history.

timeline.title: Teaching Practice
timeline.text: Individual lessons, small groups, portfolio preparation and creative projects.

timeline.title: Original Courses
timeline.text: Courses in watercolour, graphics, composition and visual thinking.

contacts.heading: Let's talk about lessons, a portfolio or a creative project.
contacts.intro: Feel free to message me, send an email or leave a short enquiry.
